reviews.review_title: A good game ruined by a bad community.
reviews.review_description:
Alright first off the racism is getting old.

People in this game are seen to be unnecessarily ignorant, racist, hyper hostile, rudely impatient, and homophobic.

Almost no one is ever serious/normal

You will get vote kicked simply just for being good at the game or playing as intended.

People have also shown numerous signs of low IQ.

The game is absolutely phenomenal and I believe you guys did a great job.

You are not the problem it’s the people who play the game that are if that isn’t clear already.

I then called him out on the radio. He then stabbed me and CALLED ME THE N WORD. I then called him a racist. HE THEN PUT A VOTE TO KICK ON ME AND SAID “I CALLED HIM THE N WORD!” You know, it’s crazy how one of the messages you get while you’re loading tells you to watch your behavior, or your account might get suspended. There’s no way they actually suspend people because if they did, there would be like four players in the whole game. VANKRUPT, PLEASE FIX YOUR COMMUNITY! Everyone else, don’t download this game.

If you are prepared to hear the N Word 10-100 times a minute (I wish I was joking), ready to not get new content for years, and ready to have to wait a while to get into a game you like to then feel free to get the game. If that isn’t for you, then you won’t like this.

And some of the other modes can be fun. They’re really great modes, though that are dead. And when I say that, I mean, you can hardly ever find any people playing them. 

And the racism is just annoying because it’s kind of hard to find a server where there is not someone spamming the N-word. And don’t forget to mention the fact that you can get kicked for anything in this game and I mean ANYTHING. There is no system making sure that it’s a valid kick. Pavlov has great gameplay mechanics, gun handling, and is an overall decent experience, but the player base makes it almost unplayable at times. This game is overrun with kids who spam the N word, random kill, and vote kick whenever they get mad they die. Atleast 3/4 of the playerbase is racist and too brainrotted to actually carry out decent matches.

The vote kicking system is alright at times but is easily abused. You can get kicked from a match just because someone is mad you're better than them, causing you to be permanently banned from that server.

I really hope the creators of Pavlov do something about enforcing age restrictions and rules, as well as improving the vote kicking system. If they could somehow get the community in check, I think this game has the potential to be one of the best shooting games in VR, but right now it's hard to recommend.

Pavlov is probably one of the most played games out there on the vr market, it's fun to play with friends  and other people, but the problem lies within the servers themselves, let me break it down for you: the game has tons of gamemodes to play that's when problem one arrives: empty servers, almost no one is playing the main game modes, so most of them are abandoned, even when. They added a new gammode (co-op killhouse) it still flopped, the only gamemode that is avaliable is custom, sure custom allows you to do whatever the heck you want, but when you actually take a look at the servers, ther all rp's military sim's, on the brighter side there are some fun game modes like codz and splatter monkey there more fun than the other custom servers, problem 2 the players themselves: the players in pavlov have the mindset of a confederate call of duty player, the n word is thrown around like its nothing, slurs are part of there vocabulary and little kids run around murdering each other, the player base has no moderation what so ever, I've been kicked so many times I could be in the 100's by now, which leads us to our third problem, moderation, the only way of getting a toxic player out of the lobbies is the vote kick system, which is abused most of the time by power hungry discord mods, its so bad too, and its the only form of moderation there is on the game, honestly pavlov has a lot of things it needs to tidy up before doing anymore, this game is worth playing but be warned ⚠️

Hi, Flex here. If you've played the game enough you've probably seen me around. I have probably hundreds of hours in this game so far, so here's my review. 

First of all, if "muh toxic community" is a problem for you, HOST YOUR OWN LOBBY! You can have private lobbies that are passcode protected or kick whoever you don't want. Noone is forcing you to join public servers, so stop posting reviews bltching & moaning about being called mean words, literally nobody cares. 

Secondly, every single other FPS lacks the options & customizability of Pavlov. Don't like HUD? Left-handed? Want more gore? This game offers that where others offer a flat experience.

Thirdly, there are custom servers that have large maps & large player bases with public servers that allow you to grind for skins & positive KD. There are also Infection + Hide & Zombie modes & a thriving mod scene. I don't see that from other VR FPS games whatsoever. 

My only cons are the lack of updates to guns, wonky hitboxes & a total lack of moderation allowing hackers to slip through the cracks. The amount of speedboosters, full auto, & aimbot users I've encountered could fill a dossier (I've even seen players adamantly claiming you cannot install these when you can literally download them using sidequest lol) 

Definitely worth getting if you want a top shelf FPS in VR, 5 stars from me & I'll keep playing as long as it's active.

(PS: Devs, if you're reading this, add more guns & fix the hitboxes. I've tested this with bots so I know. Pointblank headshots shouldn't count as bodyshots, as it stands you have to aim *above* the brow where the helmet is to get a headshot, why? Anything neck & above should count. Also, walls should have higher permeability. Modders have done this, why haven't you? Wooden fences, sheet metal, & railings on stairs shouldn't stop 7.62mm.)

Peace

Games great in concept.
However:
- Full of KIDS who vote kick you for shooting them, on a SHOOTING GAME (and usually succeed as have friends playing same server)
- Kicks = ban from the server so you can’t report the people who are making the game unplayable (no way to report servers either)
- Low player base (not surprised), generally around 100 players or less in all servers combined.

It’s a great concept but horribly executed, every server is jam packed with kids who make the game totally unplayable, many players play with hacks making them invincible - cannot be damaged by any form of firepower. 

Graphics are generally okay, has mods but the content of the mods are generally very low quality. 

Will be uninstalling and finding an alternative game worthy of my money and time.

First off, this game is impossible to be played while seated. There is no setting for this and no virtual crouching so if you need something on the floor, too bad. If you want to grab a new mag, too bad because the pouch is in your chair.
Anyway, I feel a lot like this game is only loved because the graphics are decent. People like to say the gun physics are realistic but they're really not. Recoil is incredibly unrealistic. Even if it was realistic, realism doesn't mean something is good. It is annoying to use.
There are so many games with better gun physics, more realistic gun physics etcetera.
Then the big topic, moderation. This community is worse than the gorilla tag community, either vote kicking you because you had your fingertip at the wrong angle or screaming slurs and receiving praise. People like to say "Oh its a very rare thing its not every lobby" but many times me and friends have made private instances and some kid has joined just to scream slurs.
It really isn't that good of a game and it's not very friendly to new players. The features are confusing, the mods are hard to use and to have even the slightest amount of fun you need to go into multiplayer.
This game is dead and buried.

reviews.review_title: Mic isn’t working for me and others
reviews.review_description: My mic isn’t working and I checked my settings and it was on, my friends and other people are having the same problem, I deleted it and reinstalled it but it still didn’t work, please fix it ASAP, it makes the game less fun when you can’t talk to people and explain why you want to vote kick someone
The reason why some of yall a being vote kicked is because you are being annoying just be goofy but on a calm level and for the 2-3 years i have been playing palvov i have loved it

Most of the time its normal .. until you join TTT you get femboys/me there fine furrys /me there fine but the little kids that are probably right outside of currys with their new headset playing it and saying the n word that think there funny and spawn killing until they get kicked but most of the time its just a normal game untill you get noticed that your a femboy then when you talk you get shot cause your a femboy and when actually playing the game you get either/reported or /kicked cause your too good at blood n iron
